authority.garrido_statement: except operations 1 and 2, any operation and all its variables may be decision variables (oral, live meeting; written confirmation to be requested before any confirmatory claim)
authority.thesis_source: WRAP_Theses_Garrido_Rios_2017 SS6.3.3 + Figure 6.2: Op9 dispatch Q = U(2400,2600)/day, ROP 24h, held CONSTANT by the thesis design; thesis varied only I_LS (Op3/5/9) and S
authority.no_invented_physics: this screen varies a constant the thesis itself declares, under the thesis's own risks at current/increased levels; unlike the product-coupled door (INCOMPLETE_DRAFT_NOT_EXECUTABLE) it requires no new physical mechanism

prior_evidence_boundary.not_closed_by: garrido_risk_headroom_sensitivity_v1 (DEVELOPMENT_NO_DOOR_UNDER_TESTED_FRONTIER) tested ONLY the 18 buffer-x-shift constant postures; its verdict is explicitly bounded to that frontier and says nothing about dispatch postures
prior_evidence_boundary.known_binding_cap: the chain is balanced at S1 and distribution (op9-12) is the fixed bottleneck (F11 / SHIFT_DOWNSTREAM_BOTTLENECK_AUDIT_2026-06-28); this is precisely why the lever CAN have authority where buffer x shift had none
prior_evidence_boundary.honest_prior: R22 pauses transport servers but does NOT destroy in-transit cargo (supply_chain.py:4070-4096 deliveries complete unconditionally; _take_down only increments op_down_count) -- so the value channel is post-outage surge drainage, not loss avoidance. Headroom may well be null; the screen exists to decide cheaply, learner-blind, either way.

environment.env: MFSCGymEnvShifts via make_track_b_env, action_contract=track_a_v1 (LIVE CONTRACT IS 6D: op3_q, op9_q, op3_rop, op9_rop, op5_q, shift -- env_experimental_shifts.py:2813 'Track A is now 6D')
environment.q_multiplier_map: dims 0-3: multiplier = 1.25 + 0.75*clip(a,-1,1) in [0.5,2.0]; NEUTRAL (thesis 1.0) requires a = -1/3, NOT 0.0; dim 4 op5: 1.0 + 0.5*clip, neutral 0.0
environment.pinned_dims: op3_q=-1/3, op3_rop=-1/3, op9_rop=-1/3 (all multiplier 1.0 = thesis), op5_q=0.0 (neutral), shift=S1 signature; ONLY op9_q varies
environment.op9_conservation: dispatch target min'd against on-hand (supply_chain.py:4038-4044); the lever cannot create material
environment.horizon: max_steps=520 weekly steps (10-year, matches garrido_risk_headroom_sensitivity_v1), set explicitly (env default is ~955)
environment.risk_rng_mode: per_risk (risk timeline action-independent -> CRN-comparable arms and two-pass oracle valid)

posture_family.two_mode_policies: pair (calm_posture, active_posture) with calm in multipliers {0.75,1.0,1.25} and active in all 7 -> 21 pairs; switch to active while trigger true else calm
posture_family.trigger_observable: any of ops {4,8,10,12,9,11} down per sim._is_down (the obs-vector any_loc_down/op9_down/op11_down fields, supply_chain.py:2709-2714) plus a post-event hold of 168h -- deployable, no future information
posture_family.trigger_oracle: same trigger computed from the realized risk-event windows recorded in a first pass (action-independent timeline), with anticipation lead 168h before each event start -- CLAIRVOYANT, never deployable, upper-bounds anticipation value
posture_family.selection_forbidden: no learner return anywhere; no PPO in this screen

cells.control_cell: R1_current (no R2 transport risks; expect NO reversal there -- a reversal in the control is a red flag for instrument artifact)

estimands_learner_blind.H_PI_safe: per cell: best oracle two-mode (guardrail-admissible) minus best constant (any); clustered LCB95 over seeds >= 0.02 to count as a passing cell
estimands_learner_blind.H_obs: per cell: best OBSERVABLE two-mode (guardrail-admissible) minus best constant; LCB95 >= 0.015
estimands_learner_blind.ranking_reversal: argmax posture in active windows differs from argmax in calm windows, material at tol 0.005 ReT; >= 2 materially optimal actions across states required
estimands_learner_blind.admissibility_mask_from_measured_row_sch: higher-is-better ration_ret_excel, ret_excel_cvar10 >= robust comparator; lower-is-better lost_orders, backorder_qty_final, backlog_age_max, service_loss_auc_ration_hours, resource <= robust (the garrido_risk_headroom_sensitivity_v1 mask, verbatim)
estimands_learner_blind.primary_metric: ret_excel (ret_excel_request_snapshot_v2); lost_orders is LIVE on this path (measured 89.0 in calibration) unlike the transducer path
estimands_learner_blind.resource_accounting: surge postures pay real freight; resource guardrail non-superiority enforced via the mask

seeds.collision_scan: 7540001-7549999 verified free across main repo + both worktrees (contracts+results+docs); 758xxxx burned by legacy Program H artifacts; burned 7570801-24 never reused

compute.arms: 7 constants + 21 obs two-mode + 21 oracle two-mode = 49 per cell
compute.evals: 49 arms x 6 cells x 12 seeds = 3528 + first-pass event recording 72
compute.hosts: local 10 cores + VPS 6 cores, sharded by cell

verdicts.STOP_DISPATCH_LEVER_NO_STATE_DEPENDENT_H: no connected region of >=3 cells passes H_PI+reversal gates -- even the binding-cap lever has no convertible state-dependent headroom under thesis-native risks; closes the thesis-native dynamic-decision question at this frontier
verdicts.PASS_SCREEN_GO_CLASSICAL_FREEZE: a connected region passes -> next step is FREEZING the strongest tested structured dispatch policy ((ROP,Q)/two-mode family, the thesis's own policy class) on dev seeds, then a deployable-residual test against it BEFORE any learner; a learner is authorized only if that residual leaves LCB95 >= 0.015
verdicts.no_middle_claim: a PASS here is a development screen result, never a confirmatory claim; holdout stays sealed

self_checks_required: neutral-action mapping: at pinned neutral posture, sim params op9_q_min/max == 2400/2600 exactly (introspected)
determinism: same (posture, profile, seed) twice -> identical ret_excel bit-exact
CRN: risk-event timeline identical across arms for same (profile, seed)
trigger liveness: two-mode switch count > 0 in every R2 cell, == 0 impossible
control cell: no material reversal in R1_current
